settings.title: Fifteen Years On, We Are Fitting Free Radiators
settings.excerpt: To mark the anniversary we teamed up with a local charity to put working heating into three homes that had none.
settings.body:
Pipeworks turns fifteen this year. Rather than print mugs, we asked a local housing charity where the real need was.

The answer was heating. Over the spring we fitted radiators and serviced boilers in three homes where families had been getting through winter on a single plug-in heater.

Our suppliers chipped in the parts at cost when they heard the plan, which let us stretch the work further than we had hoped.

Fifteen years of unblocking drains and chasing leaks, and this was the proudest week of the lot. Thank you to everyone who has had us round in that time.
